form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 2190m after showing early speed at Maryborough was leading by 3 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Champagnes (2:46.90) in NR 37 to 41 on March 30 at $18. Two runs back surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr2) over 2190m after showing early pace at Shepparton, beaten 70 m by Keayang Brandy (2:44.00) in NR up to 49 on October 21 at $61. Can progress aided by the ace draw.
